Crisol: Theater of Idols.notes: ℹ️ Game supports UE-Extended using Native HDR

Cyberpunk 2077.notes:
⚠️ The RenoDX mod for Cyberpunk 2077 is a WIP. Always get the latest build directly from the RenoDX Discord — it is updated more frequently than any wiki download.

See Creepy's Cyberpunk RenoDX Guide for setup instructions:

Dishonored.notes:
ℹ️ This game has both 32-bit and 64-bit RenoDX builds.

• 64-bit (default) — for the Microsoft Store and Epic Games Store versions.
• 32-bit — for the Steam version. Enable 32-bit mode in 🎯 Overrides to use this.

Grand Theft Auto V Enhanced.notes: ℹ️ Change ReShade overlay button in ReShade.ini so it doesn't conflict with Rockstar overlay

High On Life 2.notes:
⚠️ This game supports UE-Extended using native HDR. Additional steps must be taken for this to work.

Launch the game with UE-Extended installed to generate the correct segment of ReShade.ini.
Close the game and in ReShade.ini look for the line that says 'Set_Path=1' and change this to 'Set_Path=0'

Create an Engine.ini in the game's Appdata folder with the following information:

[SystemSettings]
r.AllowHDR=1
r.HDR.EnableHDROutput=1
r.HDR.Display.OutputDevice=3
r.HDR.Display.ColorGamut=2
r.HDR.UI.CompositeMode=1

[/Script/Engine.RendererSettings]
r.LUT.UpdateEveryFrame=1

You can download a preconfigured Engine.ini here:

Of Ash and Steel.notes: ℹ️ Works with UE-Extended - Upgrades SDR to HDR

Red Dead Redemption 2.notes:
⚠️ In DX12 you must use standard installs of ReShade and Display Commander OR DC Mode 1

⚠️In Vulkan you must use DC Mode 2 or install ReShade independently from the installer in %LOCALAPPDATA%/RenoDXCommander/ReShade

ℹ️ Change ReShade overlay button in ReShade.ini so it doesn't conflict with Rockstar overlay

X4: Timelines.notes: ⚠️ DC must be loaded as winmm.dll using DC Mode 2. Game will not launch with ReShade installed normally and it must be proxied through DC

FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE INTERGRADE.notes:
Recommended to use Luma for this game for best HDR results.
You must switch the game to DX11 with launch argument -dx11
